title: Section 15X
content: 1 [15X. Presiding Officer, Members and staff of Securities Appellate tribunal to be public servants.--The Presiding Officer, Members and other officers and employees of a Securities Appellate Tribunal shall be deemed to be public servants within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860)].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 59 of 2002, s. 26, for section 15X (w.e.f. 29-10-2002).
